question: What are the various phases of flight in which identified hazards can occur?

options.text: Before flight, during flight, cruising, landing, post flight.
Before flight, take-off, cruising, take-in, post flight.
Pre-flight, vertical climb, ceiling-flight, downward, post flight.
Pre-flight, take off, mid-flight, approach, landing.

classification_notes: Phases of flight and hazard identification.
